description_long: This is a modern, multi-level bungalow with a predominantly white exterior and flat roof sections. The structure features multiple outdoor terraces, landscaped garden areas, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, providing ample natural light and access to outdoor living areas. The property includes a spacious driveway and garage, as well as fenced-in green spaces with trees and patio furniture. The design incorporates clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a blend of hardscaped and softscaped surfaces. The overall layout emphasizes indoor-outdoor connectivity and contemporary urban living.
description: A modern, multi-level white bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, and spacious terraces. Features include a garage, driveway, and multiple outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main driveway, garage, and a large open terrace area, with the central structure and rooftop features visible.
description_view_1: From this angle, the landscaped garden, patio furniture, and a fenced yard with trees are prominent, along with the side entrance and outdoor stairs.
description_view_2: This side view showcases the rear garden, additional outdoor seating, and the full extent of the fenced yard, as well as the back of the main building.
description_view_3: The front facade is visible here, featuring the main entrance, garage doors, and a large paved area, with upper-level terraces and windows above.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
